---
title: ""
pagetitle: "Shows — The Hamstrings"
title-block-banner: false
---

```{=html}
<div class="page-banner">
  <img src="images/hero-mural.jpg" class="page-banner-bg" alt="The Hamstrings">
</div>
```

```{=html}
<div class="section-header-overlap shows-overlap">
  <h2>Our Shows</h2>
</div>
<div class="shows-columns">

  <div class="shows-column">
    <h3 class="shows-column-header">Upcoming</h3>

    <div class="show-card">
      <div class="show-date">
        <div class="month">MAR</div>
        <div class="day">15</div>
        <div class="year">2026</div>
      </div>
      <div class="show-details">
        <h3>Wild Heaven — Toco Hills</h3>
        <p class="venue-info"><a href="https://www.google.com/maps/search/?api=1&query=Wild+Heaven+Beer+Toco+Hills+Atlanta+GA" target="_blank">Atlanta, GA</a></p>
        <p class="show-time">3:00 PM – 6:00 PM</p>
      </div>
    </div>

    <div class="show-card">
      <div class="show-date">
        <div class="month">APR</div>
        <div class="day">25</div>
        <div class="year">2026</div>
      </div>
      <div class="show-details">
        <h3>Blue Top</h3>
        <p class="venue-info"><a href="https://www.google.com/maps/search/?api=1&query=Blue+Top+Chamblee+GA" target="_blank">Chamblee, GA</a></p>
        <p class="show-time">7:00 PM – 10:00 PM</p>
      </div>
    </div>

    <div class="show-card">
      <div class="show-date">
        <div class="month">MAY</div>
        <div class="day">16</div>
        <div class="year">2026</div>
      </div>
      <div class="show-details">
        <h3>Kirkwood Spring Fling</h3>
        <p class="venue-info"><a href="https://www.google.com/maps/search/?api=1&query=Bessie+Branham+Recreation+Center+2051+Delano+Dr+NE+Atlanta+GA" target="_blank">Atlanta, GA</a></p>
        <p class="show-time">Time TBD</p>
      </div>
    </div>

  </div>

  <div class="shows-column">
    <h3 class="shows-column-header">Recent</h3>

    <div class="show-card past">
      <div class="show-date">
        <div class="month">OCT</div>
        <div class="day">19</div>
        <div class="year">2025</div>
      </div>
      <div class="show-details">
        <h3>Love Y'all Fall Festival</h3>
        <p class="venue-info"><a href="https://www.google.com/maps/search/?api=1&query=Tucker+Brewing+Company+2003+S+Bibb+Dr+Tucker+GA" target="_blank">Tucker Brewing Company · Tucker, GA</a></p>
        <p class="show-time">1:00 PM – 5:00 PM</p>
      </div>
    </div>

    <div class="show-card past">
      <div class="show-date">
        <div class="month">OCT</div>
        <div class="day">11</div>
        <div class="year">2025</div>
      </div>
      <div class="show-details">
        <h3>Oakhurst Porchfest 2025</h3>
        <p class="venue-info"><a href="https://www.google.com/maps/search/?api=1&query=Oakhurst+Porchfest+Decatur+GA" target="_blank">Decatur, GA</a></p>
        <p class="show-time">1:00 PM – 2:00 PM</p>
      </div>
    </div>

    <div class="show-card past">
      <div class="show-date">
        <div class="month">OCT</div>
        <div class="day">10</div>
        <div class="year">2025</div>
      </div>
      <div class="show-details">
        <h3>Wild Heaven Beer</h3>
        <p class="venue-info"><a href="https://www.google.com/maps/search/?api=1&query=Wild+Heaven+Beer+135B+Maple+St+Avondale+Estates+GA" target="_blank">Avondale Estates, GA</a></p>
        <p class="show-time">6:30 PM – 9:30 PM</p>
      </div>
    </div>

    <div class="show-card past">
      <div class="show-date">
        <div class="month">OCT</div>
        <div class="day">4</div>
        <div class="year">2025</div>
      </div>
      <div class="show-details">
        <h3>Porches and Pies 2025</h3>
        <p class="venue-info"><a href="https://www.google.com/maps/search/?api=1&query=866+Murphy+Ave+SW+Atlanta+GA" target="_blank">Atlanta, GA</a></p>
        <p class="show-time">12:00 PM – 1:00 PM</p>
      </div>
    </div>

    <div class="show-card past">
      <div class="show-date">
        <div class="month">MAY</div>
        <div class="day">17</div>
        <div class="year">2025</div>
      </div>
      <div class="show-details">
        <h3>Kirkwood Spring Fling 2025</h3>
        <p class="venue-info"><a href="https://www.google.com/maps/search/?api=1&query=Bessie+Branham+Recreation+Center+2051+Delano+Dr+NE+Atlanta+GA" target="_blank">Atlanta, GA</a></p>
        <p class="show-time">1:30 PM – 2:00 PM</p>
      </div>
    </div>

    <div class="show-card past">
      <div class="show-date">
        <div class="month">MAR</div>
        <div class="day">14</div>
        <div class="year">2025</div>
      </div>
      <div class="show-details">
        <h3>The Beatles vs. The Rolling Stones</h3>
        <p class="venue-info"><a href="https://www.google.com/maps/search/?api=1&query=Eddie's+Attic+515+N+McDonough+St+Decatur+GA" target="_blank">Eddie's Attic · Decatur, GA</a></p>
        <p class="show-time">7:00 PM</p>
      </div>
    </div>

    <div class="show-card past">
      <div class="show-date">
        <div class="month">MAR</div>
        <div class="day">1</div>
        <div class="year">2025</div>
      </div>
      <div class="show-details">
        <h3>Mead Rd Mardi Gras</h3>
        <p class="venue-info"><a href="https://www.google.com/maps/search/?api=1&query=The+Imperial+726+W+College+Ave+Decatur+GA" target="_blank">The Imperial · Decatur, GA</a></p>
        <p class="show-time">3:00 PM</p>
      </div>
    </div>

  </div>

</div>
```
